query:
SELECT u.url, u.depth, u.status_code
        FROM crawl_urls u
        LEFT JOIN crawl_links l
               ON l.target_url_id = u.id AND l.crawl_id = u.crawl_id
        WHERE u.crawl_id = $1
          AND u.is_internal = true
          AND u.depth > 0
          AND l.id IS NULL
        ORDER BY u.url
        LIMIT $2
